Astroflux Wiki
Guides Systems Stations Enemies Bosses Weapons Items Artifacts Drops Media Map

Artifacts

All artifact type records are listed here with icons, special flags, level gates, recycle outputs, and drop weights. The calculator estimates odds from the artifact type drop weights among records eligible for the selected level.

Drop Calculator

Choose values to estimate odds.

Unique Artifact Crate

Crate Unique Artifact is in the drop cache as a crate with 99.8% crate chance and 99.9% artifact chance. The client marks spawned drops with containsUniqueArtifact and loads the actual artifact instance from the server on pickup, so fixed values are shown only when the client source exposes the stat family.

Boss Unique Artifact Mapping

This table is restricted to evidence found locally: boss artifact drop rows, unique artifact sprites, and ArtifactStat.isUnique. It does not invent a hidden server-side key when the client cache does not expose one.

BossMatched unique artifactArtifact drop rowsEvidence
AdvectorianAdvectorianArtifact 100% x6 @ 100%Boss name matches artifact_unique_* sprite; boss has artifact drop rows
ChelonidronNo unique sprite name matches this boss in the client cacheArtifact 100% x6 @ 100%Boss has artifact drop rows, but unique roll identity is server-side
DominatorDominatorArtifact 100% x1-3 @ 100%Boss name matches artifact_unique_* sprite; boss has artifact drop rows
ExecutorNo unique sprite name matches this boss in the client cacheArtifact 100% x10 @ 100%
Artifact 100% x5 @ 100%		Boss has artifact drop rows, but unique roll identity is server-side
Huge Mysterious ChestNo unique sprite name matches this boss in the client cacheArtifact 100% x2-4 @ 100%
Artifact 100% x3-4 @ 100%		Boss has artifact drop rows, but unique roll identity is server-side
MandromNo unique sprite name matches this boss in the client cacheArtifact 100% x5-10 @ 100%Boss has artifact drop rows, but unique roll identity is server-side
Mother BrainMotherbrainArtifact 100% x6 @ 100%Boss name matches artifact_unique_* sprite; boss has artifact drop rows
Mysterious ChestNo unique sprite name matches this boss in the client cacheArtifact 100% x2-5 @ 100%Boss has artifact drop rows, but unique roll identity is server-side
RotatorNo unique sprite name matches this boss in the client cacheArtifact 100% x7-8 @ 100%Boss has artifact drop rows, but unique roll identity is server-side
TefatTefatArtifact 100% x1 @ 100%
Artifact 100% x1 @ 100%
Artifact 100% x1 @ 100%		Boss name matches artifact_unique_* sprite; boss has artifact drop rows
The CleanerCleanerArtifact 100% x6-10 @ 100%Boss name matches artifact_unique_* sprite; boss has artifact drop rows
Three EmperorsCrown of Xhersix
Fist of Zharix
Veil of Yhgvis		Artifact 100% x10 @ 99%Boss name matches artifact_unique_* sprite; boss has artifact drop rows

Unique Artifact Catalog

Unique artifactStat / effectBoss evidenceCrateSource status
AdvectorianFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheAdvectorian artifact rolls 6Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Armorlock ProtocolStationary damage reduction: Adds damage reduction while stationary.
damageReductionWhileStationaryUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Bloodline SurgeOn-kill surge: Kills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
bloodlineSurge		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Bullwark PrismUnique low shield reduction: Adds damage reduction when shields are low.
damageReductionWithLowShieldUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
CleanerFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheThe Cleaner artifact rolls 6-10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Crown of XhersixCleansing crown: Automatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
crownOfXhersix		Three Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
DominatorFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheDominator artifact rolls 1-3Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Eternal AegisUnique damage reduction: Reduces incoming damage.
damageReductionUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Fist of ZharixKill shockwave: Kills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
fistOfZharix		Three Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Hyper Acid SplicerCorrosive ignite: Corrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
corrosiveChanceToIgnite		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Impact Emitter CoreSlow debuff: Hits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
slowDown		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Legacy CoreLegacy ship upgrade: Legacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
upgrade		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Lunacite CoreLucanite core: Weapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
lucaniteCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Mantis CoreClose target damage core: Adds damage when the target is close.
mantisCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
MotherbrainOvermind: Doubles pet count and increases pet health.
overmind		Mother Brain artifact rolls 6Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Omega Shield DriverEnergy shield overload: Energy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
energyChanceToShieldOverload		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Phase NullifierKinetic shield penetration: Kinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
kineticChanceToPenetrateShield		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Plasma Disruptor RelicEnergy resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceEnergyResistance		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Ring of YxthalKinetic resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceKineticResistance		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Scourgebinder CoreCorrosive resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceCorrosiveResistance		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
TefatFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheTefat artifact rolls 1, 1, 1Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Thermofang CoreBurning target kinetic core: Adds kinetic damage against burning targets.
thermofangCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Time Flux RelicFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactSprite only
Titanheart CoreUnique low health reduction: Adds damage reduction when health is low.
damageReductionWithLowHealthUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Veil of YhgvisCloak ambush veil: Gives damage reduction while cloaked and bonus ambush damage.
veilOfYhgvis		Three Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Velocity CoreVelocity core: Large ship speed increase.
velocityCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Virex InjectorUnique debuff damage: Increases damage dealt by debuffs.
dotDamageUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat

Boss Artifact Crates

These rows follow boss loot entries into artifact drop tables and show the effective artifact roll chance when the cache exposes it.

BossDrop tableKindBoss dropCrate rollArtifact rollEffectiveQtyArtifactsLevel

Unique Artifact Effects

This is the technical unique-effect list from ArtifactStat.isUnique. These stat families cannot be upgraded.

Unique effectGame effectStat familyUpgradeableKnown source
Slowing debuffHits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
slowDown		Slow debuffNoCrate Unique Artifact
Kinetic shield penetrationKinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
kineticChanceToPenetrateShield		Kinetic shield penetrationNoCrate Unique Artifact
Energy shield overloadEnergy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
energyChanceToShieldOverload		Energy shield overloadNoCrate Unique Artifact
Corrosive igniteCorrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
corrosiveChanceToIgnite		Corrosive igniteNoCrate Unique Artifact
Recycle CatalystRecycling junk has a better rare-material chance and higher yield.
recycleCatalyst		Recycle catalystNoCrate Unique Artifact
Beam and Missile CoreBeam and missile weapons gain bonus damage.
beamAndMissileDoesBonusDamage		Beam and missile bonusNoCrate Unique Artifact
Velocity CoreLarge ship speed increase.
velocityCore		Velocity coreNoCrate Unique Artifact
Unique damage reductionReduces incoming damage.
damageReductionUnique		Unique damage reductionNoCrate Unique Artifact
Unique low shield reductionAdds damage reduction when shields are low.
damageReductionWithLowShieldUnique		Unique low shield reductionNoCrate Unique Artifact
Unique low health reductionAdds damage reduction when health is low.
damageReductionWithLowHealthUnique		Unique low health reductionNoCrate Unique Artifact
Fortress LockAdds damage reduction while stationary.
damageReductionWhileStationaryUnique		Stationary damage reductionNoCrate Unique Artifact
OvermindDoubles pet count and increases pet health.
overmind		OvermindNoCrate Unique Artifact
Legacy hull upgradeLegacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
upgrade		Legacy ship upgradeNoCrate Unique Artifact
Lucanite CoreWeapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
lucaniteCore		Lucanite coreNoCrate Unique Artifact
Mantis CoreAdds damage when the target is close.
mantisCore		Close target damage coreNoCrate Unique Artifact
Thermofang CoreAdds kinetic damage against burning targets.
thermofangCore		Burning target kinetic coreNoCrate Unique Artifact
Kinetic resistance debuffWeapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceKineticResistance		Kinetic resistance debuffNoCrate Unique Artifact
Corrosive resistance debuffWeapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceCorrosiveResistance		Corrosive resistance debuffNoCrate Unique Artifact
Energy resistance debuffWeapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceEnergyResistance		Energy resistance debuffNoCrate Unique Artifact
Crown of XhersixAutomatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
crownOfXhersix		Cleansing crownNoCrate Unique Artifact
Veil of YhgvisGives damage reduction while cloaked and bonus ambush damage.
veilOfYhgvis		Cloak ambush veilNoCrate Unique Artifact
Fist of ZharixKills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
fistOfZharix		Kill shockwaveNoCrate Unique Artifact
Bloodline SurgeKills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
bloodlineSurge		On-kill surgeNoCrate Unique Artifact
Unique debuff damageIncreases damage dealt by debuffs.
dotDamageUnique		Unique debuff damageNoCrate Unique Artifact
Unique direct damageIncreases direct weapon damage.
directDamageUnique		Unique direct damageNoCrate Unique Artifact
Unique reflect damageReflects damage back to attackers when hit.
reflectDamageUnique		Reflect damageNoCrate Unique Artifact

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
